executives.name: Douglas Bettinger
executives.background: Mr. Bettinger has been our Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since March 2013. Prior to joining Lam, he served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Avago Technologies Limited from 2008 to 2013.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Ford Tamer
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Inphi Corporation. Previously CEO of Telegent Systems and Senior Vice President at Broadcom.
